flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Coffeyville Community College fell 40% between 2006 and 2009 (60.0% → 36.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Coffeyville Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coffeyville Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6% → 0.0%).
